hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; DIR=$(git -C "$(dirname "$FILE")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$DIR" ] && exit 0; cd "$DIR" && git add -A && git diff --staged --quiet || (git commit -m "Auto-save: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" && git push origin HEAD) 2>/dev/null || true
